title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Federal Bank International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Federal Bank International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Join the Federal Bank International Enterprises family as a Financial Analyst in Mumbai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Federal Bank International Enterprises:
Federal Bank International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Federal Bank International Enterprises!
